data.title: Fractal earns AWS Generative AI Consulting Services Competency, enhancing AI expertise for Fortune 500® firms.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, in New York City, Fractal, a leading artificial intelligence solutions provider for Fortune 500 companies, revealed that it has obtained the Generative AI Consulting Services Competency from Amazon Web Services (AWS). This achievement demonstrates Fractal’s expertise in utilizing AWS services for generative AI solutions and marks a significant accomplishment for the company's reputation in the industry.

data.title: N2OFF merged with MitoCareX, focusing on drug discovery for resistant cancers. Cleantech company invested in solar energy.
data.description: In Neve Yarak, Israel, on October 23, 2025, N2OFF, Inc. (NASDAQ: NITO), a cleantech firm specializing in solar energy investments under the RTB business model, disclosed the finalization of its merger with MitoCareX Bio Ltd., a biotech company concentrating on developing drugs for cancer treatment and other ailments by focusing on the mitochondrial SLC25 protein family.

data.title: OpenAI Codex now widely accessible with Slack integration, Codex SDK, and improved management tools, easing large-scale use.
data.description: OpenAI Codex has reached general availability, presenting new features like Slack integration, Codex SDK, and improved management tools to streamline extensive use. These enhancements aim to simplify the application at scale.

data.title: Carlyle Credit Income Fund is offering Series D Preferred Shares, prices TBD, rated ‘BBB+’. Underwriters given 30-day option.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, Carlyle Credit Income Fund (NYSE: CCIF) started an underwritten public offering of its Series D Preferred Shares. The public offering price and specifics of the Preferred Shares will be decided through discussions between the Fund and the underwriters. Rated 'BBB+' by Egan-Jones Ratings Company, the Fund intends to give the underwriters a 30-day choice to buy more Preferred Shares for overallotments.
Hungary PM Orban: We want the EU to have a strategic partnership with Ukraine but no EU membership.

data.title: SaveMyCent has helped shoppers save over $130 million since 2019, surpassing this milestone with its digital savings platform.
data.description: SaveMyCent, a digital savings platform headquartered in Brooklyn, revealed today that it has exceeded $130 million in confirmed savings provided to consumers since its establishment in 2019. The platform has gained recognition for its efficient provision of access to authentic savings opportunities.

data.title: Thermo Fisher brings Orbitrap EFOX detector targeting environmental & food safety labs. High-res mass system tackles contaminants.
data.description: Thermo Fisher Scientific has launched the Thermo Scientific™ Orbitrap Exploris™ EFOX Mass Detector in Waltham, Mass, which is the first high-resolution accurate mass (HRAM) Orbitrap system tailored for environmental and food safety labs. This system is aimed to assist in addressing worldwide concerns related to food and water quality testing due to ongoing issues with contaminants like per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS).

data.title: PHOMI's eDisplay Curtain wins Gold and Silver Innovative Design Awards at 138th Canton Fair, utilizes construction waste for sustainable buildings.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, during the 138th Canton Fair held on October 23, 2025, PHOMI's revolutionary eDisplay Curtain gained significant attention by winning both the Gold and Silver Innovative Design Awards for 2025. This innovative product creatively transforms construction waste into a zero-carbon building material.

data.title: Nuvia Dental Implant Center opens new center in Richmond, VA, known for 24-hour permanent teeth restoration services.
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia, the Nuvia Dental Implant Center, awarded Dental Implant Restoration Company of the Year by Healthcare Business Review for two consecutive years, has inaugurated its latest facility. This new center offers round-the-clock permanent teeth restoration services, expanding the company's reach to further serve the community.

data.title: World Kinect Corp appoints Ira M. Birns as CEO & Board member. Michael Kasbar transitions to Executive Chairman. Effective Jan 1, 2026.
data.description: In Miami, World Kinect Corporation (NYSE: WKC) disclosed new executive leadership appointments, effective January 1, 2026. Ira M. Birns will assume the role of Chief Executive Officer and join the Board of Directors, succeeding Michael Kasbar, the current Chairman and CEO. Kasbar will become the Executive Chairman of the Board starting January 1, 2026. This move signifies a significant shift in the company's leadership structure.

data.title: Xpect Solutions strengthens cybersecurity capabilities with new investments and program engagements, confirming its market leadership.
data.description: Xpect Solutions, a leading player in the Cybersecurity market, has reaffirmed its position through substantial investments in critical technical talent and new program engagements. The company, based in Fairfax, Virginia, disclosed this update on October 23, 2025. As part of NewSpring Holdings' platform, Xpect Solutions is strengthening its presence in the sector with a focus on enhancing its capabilities. These investments underscore the commitment to excellence and innovation in Cybersecurity and highlight the company's drive to lead in the industry.

data.title: Israel's tourism industry is recovering after a devastating Hamas assault in 2023, indicating strong signs of revival.
data.description: In Los Angeles on October 23, 2025, it was reported that Israel's tourism sector is experiencing significant recovery, two years following the harmful Hamas attack on October 7, 2023. America Israel Tours® (AIT), a prominent Holy Land travel company in the U.S., confirmed these positive developments. The industry is showing promising growth, with hotels and tourist destinations displaying increased activity.

data.title: Quantum BioPharma's licensee Unbuzzd Wellness to host webinar for its innovative beverage speeding alcohol metabolism, reducing symptoms of intoxication. Webinar on Oct 30, 2025, part of $5 million raise. Quantum BioPharma shareholders not diluted.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, Quantum BioPharma Ltd. (NASDAQ: QNTM) (CSE: QNTM) (FRA: 0K91) (Upstream: QNTM) disclosed plans for an Investor Webinar to be conducted by its licensee Unbuzzd Wellness Inc., the creator of unbuzzd TM - a beverage known for its ability to enhance alcohol metabolism, mental clarity, and reduce hangover symptoms. The webinar, scheduled for Thursday, October 30, 2025, at 4:15 pm EST (1:15 pm PST), will accompany Unbuzzd’s Reg D 506 (c) offering aiming to raise up to $5 million. Quantum BioPharma ensures its shareholders will not face any dilution due to this fundraising initiative. Quantum BioPharma is focused on developing novel solutions for neurodegenerative, metabolic disorders, and alcohol misuse, with multiple drug candidates in various developmental stages.

data.title: ZenaTech's Zena AI Division to be located in Baton Rouge, LA, offering advanced drone solutions for US Defense and Homeland Security.
data.description: ZenaTech has officially announced the establishment of its Zena AI Division, focusing on cutting-edge AI-driven drone solutions tailored for US Defense and Homeland Security purposes. The division will be situated in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, with intentions to spearhead innovative technologies in these sectors. This strategic move marks a significant development for ZenaTech as it capitalizes on the increasing demand for advanced AI applications. The decision to base the division in Baton Rouge underscores the region's potential for fostering groundbreaking advancements in AI and drone integration. This initiative aligns with ZenaTech's commitment to playing a pivotal role in enhancing national security measures. Louisiana's dynamic environment offers favorable conditions for Zena AI Division to flourish and contribute to the evolving landscape of defense and homeland security technologies.
